Excellence in Corrugated Packaging

Bhagwati Packers is a leading manufacturer of automatic corrugated 5-ply and 3-ply boxes. We combine state-of-the-art machinery with quality raw materials to deliver packaging that truly protects your products.

Our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction has made us a preferred choice for businesses across FMCG, electronics, pharmaceuticals, and e-commerce sectors.

  • Premium quality raw materials
  • Automatic corrugated box manufacturing
  • Customized packaging solutions
  • Competitive pricing
  • On-time delivery guarantee
  • Eco-friendly packaging options

Our Products

Comprehensive range of corrugated packaging solutions for every need

Corrugated Boxes

Heavy-duty automatic corrugated boxes in 3-ply and 5-ply variants. Perfect for shipping, storage, and industrial applications.

Duplex Boxes

Premium duplex board boxes with superior print quality. Ideal for retail packaging, gift boxes, and product display.

Tailor-made packaging solutions designed to your exact specifications. From concept to delivery, we bring your vision to life.

BhagwatiPackers

© 2026 Bhagwati Packers. All Rights Reserved.

Quality Corrugated Packaging Solutions for Every Industry

Corrugation Plant

Our high-speed automatic corrugation machine is the heart of our manufacturing facility. It produces perfectly formed corrugated sheets in both 3-ply and 5-ply configurations with consistent flute formation.

The machine operates at high speed ensuring large volume output while maintaining tight quality tolerances. It handles a wide range of flute types (B, C, E) to meet different strength requirements.

Printing Machine

Our multi-color flexographic printing machine delivers sharp, vibrant prints directly on corrugated sheets. It supports up to 4 color printing with precise registration for professional-grade results.

Ideal for custom branding, product information, and barcodes — ensuring your packaging stands out on the shelf and in the warehouse.

Die Cutting Machine

Our precision die-cutting machines cut corrugated sheets into exact box shapes and sizes with millimeter-level accuracy. Custom dies can be made for any box design or special shape.

This machine handles everything from standard RSC boxes to complex die-cut trays, partitions, and display units.

Slitting Machine

Our automatic slitting and scoring machine creates precise fold lines (scores) and cuts sheets to exact widths. Clean scores ensure boxes fold crisply without cracking the liner.

The machine handles various board thicknesses and can be set up quickly for different box dimensions.

Stitching & Gluing Machine

Our semi-automatic stitching and gluing unit assembles cut-and-scored blanks into finished boxes. Metal stitching pins or hot-melt glue are used depending on the box type and strength requirement.

This stage ensures every box has strong, reliable joints that hold up during transport and stacking.

Laminator for Pasting

Our high-precision laminator bonds duplex or kraft paper onto corrugated sheets with uniform pressure and glue application. This produces smooth, high-quality outer surfaces ideal for printing.

The laminator ensures bubble-free, wrinkle-free pasting across the entire sheet, resulting in premium finish boxes suitable for retail and export packaging.

Quality Control Lab

Our dedicated QC lab performs rigorous testing on every batch — including Burst Factor Test (BFT), Edge Crush Test (ECT), Box Compression Test (BCT), and moisture content checks.

We ensure every box meets or exceeds the required strength standards before dispatch, giving you confidence in the protection of your products.
